title: Dynamic Trees - Project MMO (Muddy's PMMO XP Compat)
description: Compatibility between DynamicTrees and Project MMO.
body:
**Compatibility patch between DynamicTrees and Project MMO. Awards PMMO woodcutting XP when felling DynamicTrees trees based on the number of logs.**

DynamicTrees bypasses Forge's block break events when felling trees, which means Project MMO never sees the individual logs being broken and can't award XP. This mod bridges that gap.

When you chop down a DynamicTrees tree, this mod intercepts the falling tree, counts the logs, and awards the correct PMMO XP for every log in the tree.


**Features:**

Awards PMMO woodcutting XP per log when felling any DynamicTrees tree
Works with all tree types: thin trunks, thick trunks, root breaks, cactus, mushrooms, and shroom stems
Should be compatible with all DynamicTrees addon mods (Biomes O' Plenty, Regions Unexplored, Twilight Forest, Quark, Pam's, etc.) out of the box (most modded mushroom trees should work, but some might not depending on how they're implemented)
Modded logs without explicit PMMO config automatically receive the same XP as vanilla oak logs
Supports PMMO party XP sharing
Woodcutting XP can be configured just like in PMMO


THIS MOD DOES NOT ADD ANY TREES, WORLDGEN, ETC - Just gives Project MMO XP when cutting Dynamic Trees.
